name: FullStory
description: FullStory is a digital experience intelligence platform. Capture user sessions, track server-side events, manage user records, create timeline annotations, and generate AI-powered session summaries.

capabilities.name: events_create
capabilities.description: Create a custom server-side event for a user.

capabilities.name: events_batch_import_create
capabilities.description: Create a batch import job for up to 50,000 events.

capabilities.name: events_batch_import_get
capabilities.description: Get the status of a batch events import job.

capabilities.name: events_batch_import_errors_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve errors from a batch events import job.

capabilities.name: users_create
capabilities.description: Create or update a user record with custom properties.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a user record by FullStory ID.

capabilities.name: users_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a user and all associated data.

capabilities.name: users_batch_import_create
capabilities.description: Create a batch import job for up to 50,000 user records.

capabilities.name: sessions_get_events
capabilities.description: Return all captured events for a specified session.

capabilities.name: sessions_generate_context
capabilities.description: Generate an AI-powered context analysis for a session.

capabilities.name: sessions_generate_summary
capabilities.description: Generate an AI-powered summary of a session.

capabilities.name: annotations_create
capabilities.description: Create a timeline annotation to mark deployments or events.

capabilities.name: annotations_list
capabilities.description: List all annotations in the FullStory timeline.
